reasoning: A highly disciplined daily schedule can feel rigid or stressful. An organic, earthy palette (sage green, warm sand, bone white) brings a sense of calm, wellness, and grounding, making habit tracking feel therapeutic rather than demanding.

layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-x-hidden pb-20 bg-background
layout.surface_style: flat solid backgrounds with 1px subtle borders (border-border), no massive drop shadows for routine app clarity. Small radius rounded-2xl.
layout.bento_grid: Not applicable for a vertical timeline mobile app, but widgets (progress ring, stats) use 2-column grid layout gap-4

timeline.style: Vertical left-aligned axis with a solid 2px line (border-border). Each task sits in a flat rectangular container or soft-rounded box. A circular node on the line acts as a visual checkbox indicator.

progress_ring.style: SVG circular progress bar (donut) embedded in a dashboard summary card. Uses the success color for the track and surface_secondary for the trail.

bottom_nav.style: Fixed bottom navigation, crystal glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-surface/70 border-t border-border/40 pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold tracking-wide hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-surface text-primary border border-border rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-surface_secondary transition-all

inputs.style: bg-surface border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary outline-none px-0 py-3 rounded-none w-full text-base transition-colors

calendar_heatmap.style: Grid of rounded-sm boxes similar to GitHub contributions. Colors range from surface_secondary (0%) to success (100%).

icons.usage: Stroke width 1.5 for inactive, 2 or 2.5 for active. Optical alignment for buttons.

motion.page_transition: framer-motion opacity-0 translate-y-4 to opacity-100 translate-y-0 duration-400 ease-out
motion.check_animation: framer-motion scale-0 to scale-100 bounce effect on checkbox fill

images.description: Subtle, calming organic texture background, warm sand and bone white with a hint of sage green, minimalist. Use behind auth screens or settings page headers.
Minimalist illustration of a person checking off a task. Use on history or dashboard when no tasks exist or daily goal achieved.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first responsive layout enforcing max-w-md mx-auto for desktop browsers to simulate mobile app boundaries.
Implement standard routing with React Router (or Expo Router) including: Auth (Login/Register), Dashboard (Today's Timeline), Calendar History, and Settings.
For the daily timeline, generate the exact schedule points from the user prompt statically (5:30 AM Wake Up to 11:00 PM Sleep) but allow them to be checkable and trackable.
Do not use Shadcn default Card for timeline items. Build a custom flat rectangular layout with left border acting as the timeline string.
Use lucide-react icons for the bottom tab bar (Home, History, Settings).
Ensure input fields on auth screens are highly accessible, labeled, and have high-contrast focus rings.
No AI dependencies required. Use local state or mock auth to establish the UI structure.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='timeline-item-checkbox').
Use Outfit for headers (e.g. 'Sachin Schedule', 'Today') and Satoshi for task descriptions.
